assertions.title: TUI becomes usable after onboarding
assertions.reason: The shipped TUI launcher started successfully through a real PTY and rendered a company-scoped, input-ready console for Round2 Audit Demo Company.

steps.action: Confirm the assigned audit instance at http://127.0.0.1:3100 contains the onboarded company
steps.expected: The newly onboarded audit company exists before the TUI launches
steps.observed: GET /api/companies returned Round2 Audit Demo Company (6b09a705-2900-4a52-86ba-4d6e2ce170a8).

steps.action: Launch the shipped orchestrator TUI entrypoint through a real PTY with `pnpm dev:tui -- --url http://127.0.0.1:3100 --company-id 6b09a705-2900-4a52-86ba-4d6e2ce170a8`
steps.expected: The launcher opens the post-onboarding TUI instead of failing or showing a broken console
steps.observed: The PTY-launched TUI started successfully and rendered the `Papierklammer · Round2 Audit Demo Company` header with `Connected | 2 agents | 0 active runs`.

steps.action: Verify the launched TUI is usable and company-targeted
steps.expected: The console shows the selected company plus an input-ready operator surface
steps.observed: The screen showed the company-targeted header, Agents and Chat panels, `No messages yet. Type below to start a conversation.`, the input prompt `> Type a message...`, and `Codex: connected | reasoning: high | fast: OFF`.

steps.action: Capture PTY evidence for the successful startup state
steps.expected: Saved snapshot/transcript/screenshot prove successful company-scoped TUI startup
steps.observed: Saved a trimmed terminal snapshot, a transcript that includes the exact launcher command, a PNG screenshot, and the prelaunch company API payload.

evidence.network: Precondition: GET /api/companies -> 200 with Round2 Audit Demo Company (6b09a705-2900-4a52-86ba-4d6e2ce170a8) on http://127.0.0.1:3100

summary: Tested 1 assertion on the onboarded audit TUI surface: 1 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. The shipped PTY-launched orchestrator TUI opened successfully after onboarding and showed a usable company-targeted console state for Round2 Audit Demo Company.
